# Security policy

The canonical project security policy is in [`../SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md). This file mirrors the minimum reporting details that GitHub and Scorecards need to discover.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Report vulnerabilities privately through GitHub Security Advisories:

`https://github.com/Ismail-elkorchi/pdf-engine/security/advisories/new`

Include reproduction input, expected behavior, observed behavior, impact details, and runtime or version context.

## Disclosure expectations

- We aim to acknowledge a vulnerability report within 3 business days.
- We aim to complete initial triage within 7 calendar days.
- We aim to provide a remediation plan or status update at least every 14 calendar days until the disclosure is resolved.
- Please avoid public disclosure until we confirm impact, affected versions, and a safe remediation path.
